issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing filter specifications: must specify card type conditions ([Sanji] OR {Big Mom Pirates}), exclude [Charlotte Pudding], and specify 'look at 4 cards from top' as the search scope. Current filter has kind:'Any' with no actual filtering logic.
Filter does not reflect the dual-type requirement: [Sanji] type OR {Big Mom Pirates} type, excluding [Charlotte Pudding].
Missing action for the second part of the effect: 'place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order'. This requires a separate action or clarification in the DSL structure for deck ordering.
